## Summary
<!-- What does this PR do and why? -->

## Type of change
- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] refactor / chore / test

## Checklist
- [ ] Tests added/updated and **all CI jobs pass** locally
- [ ] If the engine changed, the generated copies were re-synced (drift check passes)
- [ ] No secrets committed; env vars documented in `.env.example`
- [ ] Docs/README updated if behavior changed
